titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Vice-President for Development and Alumni Affairs, Yale University, Records
Vice-President for Development and Alumni Affairs, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:20

did.unittitle: Vice-president for development and alumni affairs, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of memoranda, correspondence, reports, and financial records documenting the activities and operations of the vice-president for development and alumni affairs. The files of Charles E. Lord, John A. Wilkinson, and Terry Holcombe detail the activities of major administrative figures. Materials related to the Yale Alumni Fund are also included.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Development and Alumni Affairs

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 7-A (YRG 7-A), Records of Yale officers and offices responsible for development policy and administration.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for materials authored or otherwise produced as official business of Yale University is retained by Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Vice-President for Development and Alumni Affairs, Yale University, Records (RU 537). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of memoranda, correspondence, reports, and financial records documenting the activities and operations of the vice-president for development and alumni affairs. The files of Charles E. Lord, John A. Wilkinson, and Terry Holcombe detail the activities of major administrative figures. Materials related to the Yale Alumni Fund are also included.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Development and Alumni Affairs

did.unittitle: Institutional Relations and Alumni Programs reports
"A Ward to the Y's," Annual reports
Yale Alumni Magazine & Journal, Alumni survey results
Yale University Printing Service, Financial Statements
Yale University Printing Service, Annual report to the President and Fellows
Yale University Printing Service, Report of Greer Allen on the University of Texas at Austin
Memoranda and chronological files of John A. Wilkinson
Records of Lawrence B. Dunham as Director of Development and Admissions Policy
"Interviews" - Meetings - "to learn what Yale is all about today"
Yale School of Medicine--Fischer, James J.--- news release
Yale College Daughters and Sons (compared with Harvard College)
